title: gilia mariposiana
intro: Gilia mariposiana, also known as Mariposa gilia, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its delicate purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Gilia mariposiana have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower fever and soothe sore throats. Gilia mariposiana can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
